info.title: Payven Sanal POS API
info.description: Payven Sanal POS — çoklu banka kart ödemeleri, 3D Secure, akıllı yönlendirme, mutabakat ve webhook altyapısı.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl -X POST https://vpos-sandbox.payven.com.tr/api/v1/checkout/sessions \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $PAYVEN_TOKEN" \
  -H "Idempotency-Key: order-1001" \
  -d '{ ...payload... }'

x-codeSamples.label: Node.js
Python
C#
Go
x-codeSamples.source:
req, _ := http.NewRequest("POST", "https://vpos-sandbox.payven.com.tr/api/v1/checkout/sessions", nil)
req.Header.Set("Authorization", "Bearer "+accessToken)
req.Header.Set("Idempotency-Key", "order-1001")
// req.Body = bytes.NewReader(payloadJSON)
resp, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

bearerAuth.description: Identity servisinden alinan Keycloak JWT. Format: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`. Token alma: POST /api/v1/auth/{slug}/token

example.title: Gecersiz token
example.detail: Access token gecersiz veya expire — refresh edin.

Forbidden.description: Yetki yok, lisans yok veya merchant pasif.

Conflict.description: Idempotency cakismasi veya gecersiz durum gecisi.

example.title: Idempotency-Key cakismasi
example.detail: Bu Idempotency-Key daha once farkli bir istek govdesi ile kullanildi.

UnprocessableEntity.description: Validasyon veya is kurali ihlali (`bank_declined`, `validation_failed`, `fraud_blocked` vb.).

Retry-After.description: Yeniden denemeden once beklemeniz gereken saniye sayisi.

ServerError.description: Sunucu hatasi. Exponential backoff ile tekrar deneyin (idempotency-key ile).

ServiceUnavailable.description: Hedef konnektor gecici olarak devre disi (circuit breaker acik) veya bagimlilik servisi erisilemez.
